data_missing: Institutional fee schedule, borrow/funding, hedge execution slippage, and post-cost lockbox evidence.
evidence_blocking: No edge is established; cost-salvage requires institutional fee/slippage proof and fresh validation.
evidence_supporting: Known artifact interpretation preserved: symbol leg positive, BTC/ETH hedge combined positive or near positive, total cost very large, net rejected.
why_it_may_survive_lower_fees_or_higher_: Artifacts indicate positive gross components while total transaction costs dominated net results; institutional fees could directly target that failure mode.

data_missing: Longer aligned liquidation/OI/funding history; max-history Coinalyze artifact found insufficient full alignment.
evidence_blocking: Only 35 closed trades; 2x fee stress was negative, so it is low-sample and fee-fragile.
evidence_supporting: Event study was promising and strategy execution baseline percentile was high on recent data.

data_missing: Longer venue-specific borrow, funding, basis, maker/taker, spread, and inventory-capacity data.
evidence_blocking: Existing closures/evaluations do not create an edge claim and may be low-return or configuration-fragile.
evidence_supporting: Funding/carry/basis artifacts exist and are economically interpretable rather than pure OHLCV pattern mining.
why_it_may_survive_lower_fees_or_higher_: Carry and basis mechanisms are structurally capital-dependent; low absolute returns may matter more at larger capital and lower execution costs.

evidence_blocking: Known fact preserved: repaired liquidity sweep execution was heavily negative.

Known fact preserved: regime breakout momentum was heavily negative.
Trap-quality lockbox failed unseen forward data: portfolio net bps about -333, null percentile about 0.07, route closed, V-next not allowed.

limitations: This is a meta-review of existing repo artifacts only; it does not read raw market data or recompute PnL from candles.
Cost scenarios are produced only where gross/cost fields are present in artifacts and assume linear cost scaling from the artifact cost base.
Lower fees and higher capital do not create edge; institutional-worthy means worth a constrained research contract, not a candidate or live permission.
Family grouping and extraction are conservative filename/field based heuristics over available artifact schemas.
